title: Cleft Lip/Palate Clinics - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Cleft Lip/Palate Clinics 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER PORTLAND CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in autism, pediatric psychology and behavioral treatment, child development, cleft lip and palate, developmental evaluation, feeding and swallowing disorders, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies, hemophilia, spina bifida, and down syndrome. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 494-8362 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER
